name: Advance America
description_short: Mansfield, TX residents can find Advance America at 2851 Matlock Rd for payday and title loans.
description_long:
Advance America at 2851 Matlock Rd #400 in Mansfield, TX is a standalone payday and title loan storefront serving the local Mansfield community. Hours are Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday from 10 AM to 3 PM, with the store closed on Sundays. This Mansfield location provides convenient access for residents seeking emergency cash solutions.

At this Mansfield, TX branch, applicants can obtain payday loans, title loans, and check cashing services. For application assistance or to apply, call +1 682-518-7244. The team can explain loan amounts, rates, and repayment terms specific to Mansfield residents.

Bring a valid government-issued ID, recent pay stub, and banking information when visiting the Mansfield storefront. This location often provides same-day or next-day funding for approved applications. If you're a Mansfield resident facing an immediate financial need, Advance America on Matlock Rd is designed to provide quick, straightforward access to payday and title loan solutions.
pros: Same-day or next-day funding available for loans up to $1,000
Wide product range: payday loans ($100-$500), installment loans ($100-$1,000), title loans ($2,000-$25,000)
Extended store hours including Saturday mornings (9am-4pm) for working customers
Online and in-store application options with phone pre-qualification
4.9 out of 5 star rating from 125,419 verified customer reviews
No prepayment penalties implied; ability to pay installment loans in multiple payments over time
cons: APR and fee structure not disclosed on website, typical for payday lenders to charge 300%+ APR
Payday loans have very short 2-4 week terms, creating high risk of borrowing cycles
Title loans require vehicle collateral, creating repossession risk if unpaid
Requires checking account and government ID, limiting access for unbanked/underbanked populations
Installment loans up to $1,000 may be insufficient for larger emergency expenses
best_for: Workers needing cash before next paycheck with reliable income for 2-4 week repayment
Vehicle owners with emergency expenses and strong repayment ability for title loans
Individuals without access to credit cards or bank loans seeking rapid funding
Spanish-speaking borrowers in Jacksonville seeking bilingual loan services
diagnosis: Advance America is best for employed individuals with immediate cash needs who can repay within 2-4 weeks or have vehicle equity for larger loans. The critical caveat is that while their customer service is highly rated, payday and title loans carry substantial APRs and fees typical of subprime lending; consumers should exhaust lower-cost alternatives (credit union loans, employer advances, payment plans with creditors) before using these products, as the cost of borrowing can be significant and short terms create debt cycle risk.
services: Installment loans ($100-$1,000, multiple payments over time)

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
